name: Google Drive
description: Access, search, and read files on Google Drive including Docs, Sheets, and Slides via the official MCP server

fields.label: Google OAuth Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console (Desktop App type)

fields.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

fields.label: Google OAuth Refresh Token
fields.description: Refresh token obtained via OAuth consent flow with drive.readonly scope

folderId.description: Restrict access to a specific folder ID
